description_long: This is a small, rustic bread roll with a golden-brown crust generously sprinkled with white sesame seeds. The crust appears thick and slightly rough, with visible scoring lines on the top, giving it a hand-crafted, artisanal look. The bread's interior is light in color, with a soft, airy crumb structure and a few visible air pockets. The loaf is roughly oval in shape, with a domed top and a flat base, and the seeds are distributed unevenly across the surface. The crust has a matte finish, and the bread looks freshly baked, with no visible packaging or branding. There are no visible slices, and the bread appears whole and unsliced.
description: A small, oval rustic bread roll with a golden-brown crust and white sesame seeds, featuring a thick, rough surface and airy interior.
description_view_0: This view shows the cut side of the bread, revealing the airy, light interior and crumb structure, along with the seeded, golden crust.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the domed top and the dense coverage of sesame seeds, with the scoring lines on the crust clearly visible.
description_view_2: The back view displays the rounded, unsliced end of the bread, with a consistent seed distribution and a slightly rough crust.
description_view_3: This angled view emphasizes the elongated shape, the thick crust, and the uneven scattering of sesame seeds.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is thick and rustic, with visible scoring lines and a generous, uneven scattering of white sesame seeds. The surface is rough and matte, contributing to an artisanal appearance.
